faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency wasp removal services throughout Malverne. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and our technicians can typically arrive at your property within a few hours of your call during peak season.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets in Malverne?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and proven techniques that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed exterminators follow strict safety protocols, and we'll provide clear instructions on any brief precautions needed during and after treatment.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Malverne, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Malverne properties commonly experience issues with yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. These species build nests in eaves, attics, trees, and underground locations. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all wasp species found in Nassau County.
